classification_rationale: This video shows a person (likely Cary Staples from 'VSG Life Skills') speaking directly to camera in a home/office setting with motivational posters on the wall. There is a whiteboard visible with discussion prompts about surgeon's experience and lifestyle changes. The content is lifestyle/motivational coaching or educational discussion, not a demonstration or performance of any FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task. No laparoscopic instruments, training models (pegs, gauze, Penrose drain, foam appendage), or surgical task execution is visible.
reason_not_scorable: No FLS task equipment, instruments, or performance activity is present. This is personal development/educational content outside the scope of FLS assessment.

minimal_response.recommendation: Do not score. Content is motivational/lifestyle coaching, not FLS task performance or demonstration.
